chapter_title.en: Chapter on the Inheritance of the Magians (zoroastrians)

text: 5751 - وَ رَوَى مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ اَلْوَلِيدِ عَنْ حَمَّادِ بْنِ عُثْمَانَ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ قَالَ : "إِنَّمَا جُعِلَ لِلْمَرْأَةِ قِيمَةُ اَلْخَشَبِ وَ اَلطُّوبِ لِئَلاَّ تَتَزَوَّجَ فَتُدْخِلَ عَلَيْهِمْ مَنْ يُفْسِدُ مَوَارِيثَهُمْ ".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.5751 - Muhammad ibn Al-Walid narrated from Hammad ibn Uthman from Abu Abdullah Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as) who said:
"The woman was only given the value of wood and bricks so that she does not marry and bring into the family someone who would corrupt their inheritance."
